title: Pet Cost Calculator - Annual Pet Ownership Expenses
description: Free pet cost calculator. Estimate the annual cost of owning a dog or cat including food, vet bills, grooming, and supplies.
keywords: pet cost calculator, cost of owning a dog, cost of owning a cat, pet expenses, annual pet costs
intro: Estimate the annual cost of pet ownership. Select your pet type and care choices to see a detailed expense breakdown.

faq.q: How much does a dog cost per year?
faq.a: Dogs cost $1,500-$4,500 per year on average, depending on size, health, and lifestyle choices.

faq.q: How much does a cat cost per year?
faq.a: Cats cost $1,000-$2,500 per year on average, generally less than dogs due to lower food and grooming costs.

faq.q: What are the hidden costs of pet ownership?
faq.a: Emergency vet bills ($1,000-$5,000), pet deposits/rent ($200-$500/yr), boarding ($25-$75/day), and training classes.
